クラス ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore
含まれているクラス:
ObservationEncoder
public static class ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore extends Object
Loads and caches character capability profiles from a JSON file.

Profiles are read once at construction time and never reloaded. If a character ID is not found, all four scores default to [0,0,0,0] and a warning is printed at most once per missing ID per JVM process.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • CapabilityProfileStore

      private CapabilityProfileStore()

    • CapabilityProfileStore

      public CapabilityProfileStore(String path)
      Constructs a store by loading profiles from the given file path. If the file cannot be read, an empty store is used and a warning is printed.
      パラメータ:
      path - path to the capability profiles JSON file

  • メソッドの詳細

    • empty

      public static ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore empty()

    • getProfile

      public double[] getProfile(CharacterId id)
      Returns the capability profile for the given character ID. If no profile is found, returns [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0] and logs a one-time warning.
      パラメータ:
      id - character ID
      戻り値:
      double array of length 4: [off_field_ratio, team_buff_score, self_enhancement_score, energy_gen_score]

    • loadFromFile

      private void loadFromFile(String path)

    • extractDouble

      private static double extractDouble(String block, String key)
